titleStmt.title: SII 26.61: original edition by P. R. Srinivasan
No. 61. (A.R. No. 59 of 1909.) TIRUKKAḺUKKUṈṞAM, CHINGLEPUT TALUK, CHINGLEPUT DISTRICT.

summary.p: On the north wall of the kicthen in the Bhaktavatsalēsvara temple, left of entrance.

This record, in characters of about the 13th century A.D., gives details of date, viz., Tulā, śu. 6, Friday, Mūlam which may correspond to 1265 A.D., October 16, f.d.t. ·20; the nakshatra ended on the previous day at. 67.

It records the gift of the village Karumārampākkamēṟi, made tax-free by the people (nāṭṭār) of Kaḷattūr-paṟṟu to the temple of Tirukkaḻukkuṉṟamuḍaiya-nāyaṉār at Tirukkaḻukkuṉṟam in Kaḷattūr-kōṭṭam in Jayaṅgoṇḍaśōḻa maṇḍalam for offerings during the Kāliṅgarāyaṉ-śandhi established by Kappalūruḍaiyāṉ Karumāṇikka •••• alias Kāliṅgarāyar of Kappalūr alias Ulagaḷandaśōḻanallūr in Muttūṟṟu-kkūṟṟam in Pāṇḍi-maṇḍalam and for the festival held in Aippaśi on the day of Pūrāḍam, the natal star of Kāliṅgarāyar.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . koccaṭaiyapaṉmarāṉa tribhuvanaccakravattikaḷ [śrī] virapāṇḍya tevaṟkku Iyāṇṭu patiṉ
muṉṟāvatu tulānāyaṟṟu pūrvvapakṣattu ṣaṣṭhiyum veḷḷikkiḻamaiyum peṟṟa mūlattu nāḷ
jeyaṅkoṇṭacoḻamaṇṭalattu kaḷattūr koṭṭattu tirukkaḻukkuṉṟattu Uṭaiyār
tirukkaḻukkuṉṟamuṭaiya nāyaṉārkku kaḷattūrpaṟṟu nāṭṭārom pāṇṭimaṇṭalattu muttū
ṟṟukkūṟṟattu kappalūrāṉa Ulakaḷanta coḻanallūr kappalūruṭaiyāṉ karumāṇikka ṉāṉa
kāliṅkarāyar kaṭṭiṉa kāliṅkarāyaṉ cantikkum Ivaruṭaiya jeṉma nakṣattram pūrāṭam tirtamāka kaṇṭa Aippa
cit tirunāḷaikku veṇṭum nimantaṅkaḷukkum nāṅkaḷ mutalaṭaṅka Iṟaiyiliyākak kuṭutta karumārampākkam Eṟi
Ūrkerallaikkum Uṭpaṭṭa naṉcey puṉcey poṉvari taṟiiṟai taṭṭārppāṭṭam Erimiṉpāṭṭam Iruntu paṟimāṟuvār
cekkukkaṭamai maṟṟum Epperpaṭṭa Upātikaḷum Uṭpaṭa mutalaṭaṅka Iṟaiiliyākak kuṭuttom caṉtarātittavaraiyāka mutala
ṭaṅka Iṟaiyiliyākak kuṭuttom kaḷattūrpaṟṟu nāṭṭārom Ivai Irācanārāyaṇa tamiḻavatarayaṉ Eḻuttu Ivai kaṅkaikoṇ
ṭa tamiḻavatarayaṉ Eḻuttu Ivai tamiḻavatarayaṉ Āṭkoṇṭāṉ Eḻuttu Ivaip pallavarāyaṉ Aḻakiyavarataṉ Eḻuttu Ivai vāḻavantāṉ
Eḻuttu Ivai tāḻampākkiḻāṉ Eḻuttu Ivai vikkiramacoḻattamiḻatarayaṉ Eḻuttu Ivai valavatarayaṉ Eḻuttu Ivai karuṅ
kuppai cittavaṭatevaṉ Eḻuttu Ivai mācilāmaṇiyāṉaāḻvāṉ Eḻuttu Ivai tamiḻatarayar tiruvālakoiluṭaiyāṉ Eḻuttu
Ivai tiṇaiyāṉ Eḻuttu Ivaikuḷattuḻāwritten below.ṉ Eḻuttu Ivai cāttantai Eḻuttu Ivai kiḷiñalūr kiḻavaṉ kāṅkeyarāyaṉ Eḻuttu
Ivai vikkiramacoḻattamiḻavatarayaṉ vaṭukanātaṉ Eḻuttu Ivainerumūrkiḻavaṉ tiruvoṟṟiyūruṭaiyāṉ Eḻuttu Ivai
nāraikiḻāṉeḻuttu Ivai karuṅkuppai Eḻuttu Ivai Ariyalūruṭaiyāṉ kākkunāyakaṉ Eḻuttu Ivai Uṭaiyāṉ Eḻuttu I
vai kuṉ(n)tai Eḻuttu Ivai Aruḷāḷaperumāḷ Eḻuttu Ivai cempiyaṉ tamiḻatarayaṉ Eḻuttu Ivai nerumur kiḻavaṉ mācilāma
ṇiyar Āḻvān kaṇṇappiḷḷai Eḻuttu Ivai nerurkiḻavan kaṅkappiḷḷai Eḻuttu Ivai karikārcoḻanerumurnāṭṭu veḷā
ṉ Eḻuttu Ivai Irācanārāyaṇa nerumurnāṭṭu veḷāṉ Eḻuttu Aruviyūrkiḻāṉ Eḻuttu Ivai Irācakempirattamiḻatarayaṉ Eḻuttu .
Digital edition of SII 26.61 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
